app.title: Hop and Haul — fly cheap, haul the rest
meta.description: Flies you into the airport that's actually cheap, then tells you honestly whether the train ride from there is worth it.
map.aria: Trip map — click a destination to plan a route
sub: Search a place or click the map to set your destination. I compare flying direct against hopping into a cheaper hub and hauling the rest by train, bus, or car — and only recommend the split when it actually saves you money.
theme.title: Theme
theme.desc.oled: OLED black, easy on a dark cabin
theme.desc.vintage: Parchment and ink, old travel-poster style
theme.desc.contrast: Black, white, and yellow — max contrast
theme.desc.amber: Black and amber, old CRT departure board
search.label: Search a city, address, or landmark
search.placeholder: Search a city, address or landmark…
search.unavailable: Search unavailable — click the map instead
form.round: Round trip (real fares with a return date, else ≈ 2×)
badge.liveNote: — add a date for live fares
legend.sr: Map legend: blue marker is your origin airport, ink-colored marker is the destination airport, dim markers are candidate gateway hubs — the recommended hub turns green, matching the recommendation card. A dotted line is a flight leg; a dashed line is a ground leg (train, bus, or drive).
announce.readyDirect: Recommendation ready: fly direct is your best option.
announce.readySplit: Recommendation ready: {name} saves money vs flying direct.
announce.copyFail: Couldn't copy the link automatically — copy it from the address bar instead.
announce.noNearest: Couldn't resolve the nearest airport to that click.
error.network: Network error reaching the local server.
rec.directBest: The cheapest direct flight is already your best option.
rec.cleanWin: A clean win either way you weigh it.
rec.adds: Adds {hours} vs direct. Worth it unless your time is worth more than {money}/hr.
rec.atRateAhead: At {money}/hr you come out ahead by {diff}.
rec.atRateBehind: At {money}/hr you come out behind by {diff}.
rec.noSlower: And it's no slower than flying direct.
greenest.note: {name} is the lowest-carbon option here ({co2} est., vs {co2rec} for the pick above) — your call whether that's worth the trade-off.
caution.split: Split legs booked separately aren't protected — a delayed flight can forfeit a non-refundable train/bus ticket.
caution.prices: Prices move fast — re-verify before booking.
caution.pricesEst: Prices are estimates and move fast — re-verify before booking.
err.title: Couldn't plan that route
err.fallback: Unknown error — try a different point or check your connection.
empty.title: Pick where you're headed
empty.body: Search a city above or click anywhere on the map — I'll compare flying direct against hopping into a cheaper hub and hauling the rest by train, bus, or car.
loading.title: Crunching the numbers…
lang.title: Language
